title: Fix remaining snprintf bounds, format_ipv6 stack safety and error paths
description: Ensure lichen_coap_format_ipv6 and all snprintf (in routes prefix) have strict bounds checking preventing stack overflow. Update ipv6_buf sizes if needed. Prevent partial writes to CBOR.
close_reason: Decomposed into subtasks (3fih.4.1 snprintf audit, 3fih.4.2 format_ipv6 stack safety, 3fih.4.3 routes/CBOR partial writes)
